'''''Resolute''''' was an [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught]] used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] early on in the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Its commander was [[Angela Krin]].

==History==
The ''Resolute'' blockaded the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] world [[Endregaad]] following an outbreak of a plague. This was to ensure that the plague would not spread beyond this planet.
During this action, the ''Resolute'' intercepted the freighter [[New Ambition|''Shadowfire'']] which had been sent by [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to rescue his child, [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]], who was stuck on the planet.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Resolute'' appears only in the adventure ''Tempest Feud'', which has no specific chronological placement, other than occurring sometime between [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]] and [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

==Appearances==
